See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 38760 => 'BH Telecom', 38761 => 'BH Telecom', 38762 => 'BH Telecom', 38763 => 'HT ERONET', 38764 => 'HT ERONET', 38765 => 'm:tel', 38766 => 'm:tel', 38767 => 'm:tel', ];
